placeholderRules.filename: Generated placeholder assets use lowercase kebab-case and end with -placeholder before the extension.
placeholderRules.palette: Use pale blue sky as the base with Morandi dusty blue, sage green, warm beige, and mist pink accents.
placeholderRules.privacy: Memory photos are owner-provided placeholders; do not invent private captions or replacement content.
placeholderRules.replacement: When final art replaces a placeholder, keep the manifest key stable and update only the file path when needed.

characters.description: Brown Sugar character placeholder atlas for boot and preview scenes.

scenes.description: Pale blue sky placeholder background for the current GameScene.

ui.description: Soft loading panel placeholder for Phaser preload UI.

bowls.description: MBTI glass bowl placeholder sheet for future ending previews.
